calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Validity Of Trust; Confirming Trustee And Confirming Asset Of Trust Under Cal. Prob. Code 850
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Validity Of Trust; Confirming Trustee And Confirming Asset Of Trust Under Cal. Prob. Code 850
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Continued To Oct-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alicia Gamez for Vivian Imperiale (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it is pretty clear that the property belongs in the Trust, that this does not fall under Heggstad, that the property is in the Trust, that it is a faulty deed, that they need to clear the title and that it needs to be fixed. Ms. Gamez stated that the title company believes the property was not properly transferred to the Trust, that they believe the instrument that was used to put the property in the Trust was ineffective and that the title company is requesting a Court order. Ms. Gamez also stated that the correct legal description of the property is in the petition and the order, and that the title company will accept modification of the title. The Petition for Order Confirming Validity of Trust, etc. is continued to October 30, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Gamez will contact the title company to see if they will reform the deed with this order.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
